---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
pacman::p_load(
  tidyverse,
  patchwork,
  furrr,
  purrr,
  here)
```

```{r}
# Paths 
path_to_plot = here("scripts_confidence", "plots_raw_confidence")

# path to data
base_path <- "/Users/au611734/Documents/cicap_youth/data/data_hrd"

path_HC        <- file.path(base_path, "kontrol_HRD_REDCap")
path_FAPD_pre  <- file.path(base_path, "FGID_HRD_REDCap_pre_i-CBT")
path_FAPD_post <- file.path(base_path, "FGID_HRD_REDCap_post_i-CBT")
```


# create function to load every data file 

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Confidence Ratings by deltaBPM (binned) and Correctness
# Groups: HC, FAPD_pre, FAPD_post
# ============================================================
# Column name assumptions
#   confidence : numeric confidence rating, 1 to 100
#   correct    : string indicating correct vs incorrect (TRUE / FALSE)
#   deltaBPM   : numeric delta BPM value
# ============================================================


# ---- 1. Load data from all three group folders ------------------------------

# Helper: read all _final.txt files from a folder, tag with group + recordid
read_group_data <- function(path, group_label) {
  files <- list.files(path, pattern = "_final\\.txt$", full.names = TRUE)

  if (length(files) == 0) {
    warning(paste("No _final.txt files found in:", path))
    return(tibble())
  }

  map_dfr(files, function(file) {
    filename <- basename(file)
    recordid <- str_extract(filename, "(?i)(?<=recordid[_-])\\d+") # case insensitive

    read_delim(file) %>%
      mutate(
        cohort   = group_label,
        recordid = as.numeric(recordid)
      )
  })
}

# Read all three groups
df_HC        <- read_group_data(path_HC,        "HC")
df_FAPD_pre  <- read_group_data(path_FAPD_pre,  "FAPD_pre")
df_FAPD_post <- read_group_data(path_FAPD_post, "FAPD_post")

# Combine
df_all <- bind_rows(df_HC, df_FAPD_pre, df_FAPD_post)
```


```{r}
# ---- 2. Configuration -------------------------------------------------------

# Column name mapping 
COL_CONFIDENCE <- "Confidence"
COL_CORRECT    <- "ResponseCorrect"
COL_DELTABPM   <- "Alpha"

# ---- 3. Tidy & bin ----------------------------------------------------------

se <- function(x) sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(sum(!is.na(x)))

df <- df_all %>%
  rename(
    confidence = Confidence,
    correct    = ResponseCorrect,
    deltaBPM   = Alpha
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # Normalise 'correct' to clean labels regardless of input format
    correct = case_when(
      correct == "TRUE" ~ 1,
      correct == "FALSE" ~ 0,
      .default = correct # if none of the above values match, just put what ever was already in the correct column
    )
  ) %>% 
  drop_na(confidence, correct, deltaBPM) 
```

```{r}
# bins
n_bins = 9
bins <- seq(-50.5, 50.5, length.out = n_bins + 1) # length.out is number of boundaries, not bins

```


```{r}
# ---- 4. Summarise for averaged plots (per cohort) ---------------------------

############ plot average HC ########
n_subjects <- df %>% 
  filter(cohort == 'HC') %>% 
  distinct(recordid) %>% 
  nrow()

df_summary <- df %>% 
  filter(cohort == 'HC') %>% 
  mutate(
    correct = as.factor(correct),
    deltaBPM_bin = cut(deltaBPM, breaks = bins, include.lowest = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  group_by(deltaBPM_bin, correct) %>%
  summarise(
    n         = n(),
    mean_conf = mean(confidence, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(confidence),
    se_conf   = sd(confidence, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )

df_summary %>%
  ggplot() +
  aes(x = deltaBPM_bin, y = mean_conf, color = correct, group = correct) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_conf - se_conf, ymax = mean_conf + se_conf), width = 0.25) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n, y = 5), size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  annotate("text", x = 2.5, y = 10, size = 4, label = "Number of datapoints in each bin:", color = "lightskyblue4") +
  labs(
    title = paste0("Healthy controls mean confidence ratings and SE error bars, N = ", n_subjects)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) 

#ggsave(filename = paste0("HC_mean_conf_", n_bins, "_bins.png"), path = path_to_plot, width = 22, height = 15, units = "cm")

```

```{r}
############ plot average FAPD pre ########
n_subjects <- df %>% 
  filter(cohort == 'FAPD_pre') %>% 
  distinct(recordid) %>% 
  nrow()

df_summary <- df %>% 
  filter(cohort == 'FAPD_pre') %>% 
  mutate(
    correct = as.factor(correct),
    deltaBPM_bin = cut(deltaBPM, breaks = bins, include.lowest = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  group_by(deltaBPM_bin, correct) %>%
  summarise(
    n         = n(),
    mean_conf = mean(confidence, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(confidence),
    se_conf   = sd(confidence, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )

df_summary %>%
  ggplot() +
  aes(x = deltaBPM_bin, y = mean_conf, color = correct, group = correct) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_conf - se_conf, ymax = mean_conf + se_conf), width = 0.25) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n, y = 5), size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  annotate("text", x = 2.5, y = 10, size = 4, label = "Number of datapoints in each bin:", color = "lightskyblue4") +
  labs(
    title =  paste0("FAPD pre mean confidence ratings and SE error bars, N = ", n_subjects)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) 

#ggsave(filename = paste0("FAPD_pre_mean_conf_", n_bins, "_bins.png"), path = path_to_plot, width = 22, height = 15, units = "cm")
```


```{r}
############ plot average FAPD_post ########
n_subjects <- df %>% 
  filter(cohort == 'FAPD_post') %>% 
  distinct(recordid) %>% 
  nrow()

df_summary <- df %>% 
  filter(cohort == 'FAPD_post') %>% 
  mutate(
    correct = as.factor(correct),
    deltaBPM_bin = cut(deltaBPM, breaks = bins, include.lowest = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  group_by(deltaBPM_bin, correct) %>%
  summarise(
    n         = n(),
    mean_conf = mean(confidence, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(confidence),
    se_conf   = sd(confidence, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )

df_summary %>%
  ggplot() +
  aes(x = deltaBPM_bin, y = mean_conf, color = correct, group = correct) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_conf - se_conf, ymax = mean_conf + se_conf), width = 0.25) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n, y = 5), size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  annotate("text", x = 2.5, y = 10, size = 4, label = "Number of datapoints in each bin:", color = "lightskyblue4") +
  labs(
    title = paste0("FAPD_post mean confidence ratings and SE error bars, N = ", n_subjects)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) 

#ggsave(filename = paste0("FAPD_post_mean_conf_", n_bins, "_bins.png"), path = path_to_plot, width = 22, height = 15, units = "cm")

```

```{r}
########### ALL DATASETS ########
n_datasets <- df %>%
  distinct(subj) %>% 
  nrow()


df_summary <- df %>% 
  mutate(
    correct = as.factor(correct),
    deltaBPM_bin = cut(deltaBPM, breaks = bins, include.lowest = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  group_by(deltaBPM_bin, correct) %>%
  summarise(
    n         = n(),
    mean_conf = mean(confidence, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(confidence),
    se_conf   = sd(confidence, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups   = "drop"
  ) #%>% complete(deltaBPM_bin, correct)   # fills in missing bin/correct combinations with NA

df_summary %>%
  ggplot() +
  aes(x = deltaBPM_bin, y = mean_conf, color = correct, group = correct) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_conf - se_conf, ymax = mean_conf + se_conf), width = 0.25) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n, y = 5), size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  annotate("text", x = 2.5, y = 10, size = 4, label = "Number of datapoints in each bin:", color = "lightskyblue4") +
  labs(
    title    = paste("All datasets: mean confidence ratings and SE error bars, N =", n_datasets, "datasets"),
    subtitle = "NB some datasets belong to the same participant"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) 

#ggsave(filename = paste0("all_mean_conf_", n_bins, "_bins.png"), path = path_to_plot, width = 20, height = 15, units = "cm")


# plotting all data points just to see
df %>%
  mutate(
    correct = as.factor(correct) 
    ) %>%
  ggplot() +
  aes(x = deltaBPM, y = confidence, color = Decision) + #, group = Decision) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = paste("All datasets: mean confidence ratings and SE error bars N =", n_datasets, "datasets"),
    subtitle = "NB some datasets belong to the same participant"
  ) 

```

```{r}
# plotting decision
n_bins = 6
bins <- seq(-50.5, 50.5, length.out = n_bins + 1) # length.out is number of boundaries, not bins


df %>% # plotting decision not correct or not
  mutate(
    deltaBPM_bin = cut(deltaBPM, breaks = bins, include.lowest = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  group_by(deltaBPM_bin, Decision) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_conf = mean(confidence, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_conf   = sd(confidence, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups   = "drop"
  ) %>%
 # complete(deltaBPM_bin, correct) %>%   # fills in missing bin/correct combinations with NA
  ggplot() +
  aes(x = deltaBPM_bin, y = mean_conf, color = Decision, group = Decision) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_conf - se_conf, ymax = mean_conf + se_conf), width = 0.25) +
  labs(
    title = paste("All datasets: mean confidence ratings and SE error bars N =", n_datasets, "datasets"),
    subtitle = "NB some datasets belong to the same participant"
  ) #+ coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,100))


df %>% # plotting decision not correct or not
 # complete(deltaBPM_bin, correct) %>%   # fills in missing bin/correct combinations with NA
  ggplot() +
  aes(x = deltaBPM, y = confidence, color = Decision, group = Decision) +
  geom_smooth() +
  labs(
    title = paste("All datasets: mean confidence ratings and SE error bars N =", n_datasets, "datasets"),
    subtitle = "NB some datasets belong to the same participant"
  ) #+ coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,100))


```


```{r}

# ---- 5. Plot raw confidence ratings per participant ---------------------------

# first create new participant id's based on group and current recordid 
df = df %>% mutate(
  subj = paste0(cohort, recordid),
  subj = as.factor(subj),
  subj = match(subj, unique(subj)),
  subj = as.factor(subj),
  correct = as.factor(correct)
)

# then make function to plot each subjects raw confidence ratings colored by correct/incorrect

plot_conf_raw <- function(subject, save_plot = FALSE){
  
  df_subj = df %>% filter(subj == subject)
  group <- unique(df_subj$cohort)
  
  #create plot
  plot = df_subj %>% 
  ggplot() +
  aes(deltaBPM, confidence, color = correct) + geom_point() + 
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-50.5,50.5), ylim = c(0,100)) + 
  labs(title = paste("Raw confidence ratings for subject", group, subject))
  
  if (save_plot){
    path_to_plot = here("scripts_confidence", "plots_raw_confidence")
    ggsave(filename = paste0("raw_conf_", group ,"_", subject,".png"), 
           path = path_to_plot, width = 20, height = 15, units = "cm")
  }
  return(plot)
}

# walk through list of datasets
walk(unique(df$subj), plot_conf_raw, save_plot = TRUE)

# testing
#plot_conf_raw(171)

```

```{r}
# plot colored by response times and without fixed x-axis to more easily inspect data
plot_conf_raw_rt <- function(subject, save_plot = FALSE){
  
  df_subj = df %>% filter(subj == subject)
  group <- unique(df_subj$cohort)
  
  #create plot
  plot = df_subj %>% 
  ggplot() +
  aes(deltaBPM, confidence, color = DecisionRT) + geom_point() + 
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-50.5,50.5)) + #, ylim = c(0,100)) + 
  labs(title = paste("Raw confidence ratings for subject", group, subject))
  
  if (save_plot){
    path_to_plot = here("scripts_confidence", "plots_raw_confidence")
    ggsave(filename = paste0("raw_conf_RT_", group ,"_", subject,".png"), 
           path = path_to_plot, width = 20, height = 15, units = "cm")
  }
  return(plot)
}

#plot_conf_raw_rt(132)
#plot_conf_raw_rt(171)

walk(unique(df$subj), plot_conf_raw_rt, save_plot = TRUE)

```

```{r}
# plot colored by decision (faster/slower) and without fixed y-axis to more easily inspect data
plot_conf_raw_decision_no_fixed_axis <- function(subject, save_plot = FALSE){
  
  df_subj = df %>% filter(subj == subject)
  group <- unique(df_subj$cohort)
  
  #create plot
  plot = df_subj %>% 
  ggplot() +
  aes(deltaBPM, confidence, color = Decision) + geom_point() + 
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-50.5,50.5)) + #, ylim = c(0,100)) + 
  labs(title = paste("Raw confidence ratings for subject", group, subject))
  
  if (save_plot){
    path_to_plot = here("scripts_confidence", "plots_raw_confidence")
    ggsave(filename = paste0("raw_conf_decision_", group ,"_", subject,".png"), 
           path = path_to_plot, width = 20, height = 15, units = "cm")
  }
  return(plot)
}

plot_conf_raw_decision_no_fixed_axis(132)
plot_conf_raw_decision_no_fixed_axis(171)

walk(unique(df$subj), plot_conf_raw_decision_no_fixed_axis, save_plot = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# plot colored by decision (faster/slower) and WITH fixed y-axis to more easily COMPARE data across participants
plot_conf_raw_decision_fixed_y_axis <- function(subject, save_plot = FALSE){
  
  df_subj = df %>% filter(subj == subject)
  group <- unique(df_subj$cohort)
  
  #create plot
  plot = df_subj %>% 
  ggplot() +
  aes(deltaBPM, confidence, color = Decision) + geom_point() + 
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-50.5,50.5), ylim = c(0,100)) + 
  labs(title = paste("Raw confidence ratings and decision for subject", group, subject))
  
  if (save_plot){
    path_to_plot = here("scripts_confidence", "plots_raw_confidence")
    ggsave(filename = paste0("raw_conf_decision_fixed_y_", group ,"_", subject,".png"), 
           path = path_to_plot, width = 20, height = 15, units = "cm")
  }
  return(plot)
}

plot_conf_raw_decision_fixed_y_axis(132)
plot_conf_raw_decision_fixed_y_axis(171)

walk(unique(df$subj), plot_conf_raw_decision_fixed_y_axis, save_plot = TRUE)
```














```{r}
# plot binned ratings per participant - might not make sense
df %>% filter(subj==6) %>% 
  mutate(
    deltaBPM_bin = cut(deltaBPM, breaks = bins, include.lowest = TRUE)
  ) %>% 
  group_by(deltaBPM_bin, correct) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_conf = mean(confidence, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_conf   = sd(confidence, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups   = "drop"
  ) %>%
  ggplot() +
  aes(x = deltaBPM_bin, y = mean_conf, color = correct, group = correct) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_conf - se_conf, ymax = mean_conf + se_conf), width = 0.25) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Participant",df$cohort, df$subj, "mean confidence ratings and SE error bars"
      )
    ) #+ geom_point(y = df$confidence) # might be nice to overlay raw data points


df_summary <- df %>% 
  filter(subj == '1') %>% 
  mutate(
    correct = as.factor(correct),
    deltaBPM_bin = cut(deltaBPM, breaks = 7, include.lowest = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  group_by(deltaBPM_bin, correct) %>%
  summarise(
    n         = n(),
    mean_conf = mean(confidence, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(confidence),
    se_conf   = sd(confidence, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )
```
